name: jenkins-cli
description: Safe usage guidance and workflows for the local Jenkins CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Use Jenkins CLI with risk-aware safeguards.
interface.longDescription: Query Jenkins, inspect jobs and console logs, diagnose permissions, and handle configuration or build operations according to explicit risk boundaries.
defaultPrompt: List the Jenkins jobs available to me.
Show the console log for this Jenkins build.
Diagnose this Jenkins CLI permission error.
